products.title: OnePlus 13R (Nebula Noir, 12GB RAM, 256GB Storage)
products.short_description: OnePlus 13R with Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 6000mAh battery, 120Hz AMOLED display, and flagship-level performance.
products.long_description: The OnePlus 13R is a flagship killer smartphone designed for high performance and smooth user experience. Powered by the Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor, it delivers ultra-fast performance, efficient multitasking, and seamless gaming up to 120fps. The device features a large 6000mAh battery ensuring all-day usage, combined with intelligent battery management for improved efficiency. Its 1.5K ProXDR AMOLED display offers vibrant colors and excellent brightness even in outdoor conditions. With a triple camera setup including a 50MP Sony sensor, telephoto lens, and ultra-wide camera, the phone delivers versatile photography capabilities. OxygenOS 15 enhances productivity with AI-powered features and smooth UI experience.
pros: Excellent battery life lasting over a day
Great gaming performance with stable FPS
cons: Camera performance inconsistent in some conditions
Charging speed could be faster for 6000mAh
Video recording not best in segment

positive: Long battery life and reliable usage

offers: GST invoice available for business users
